name: First American State Bank
description_short: First American State Bank is a Colorado-based community bank offering personal and business banking, lending, and deposit products with a focus on personalized service.
description_long:
First American State Bank is a Colorado-based community bank located in Greenwood Village that has been operating for 30 years. The bank emphasizes personalized, relationship-driven banking with a stated philosophy of knowing clients by name and providing industry-leading personal attention. Their website highlights a commitment to innovation, modern technology, and first-class customer service across business, professional, and personal banking needs.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of services including personal and business deposit products, lending solutions, residential and commercial real estate financing (mortgages, bridge loans, HELOCs), cash management solutions, mobile banking via their FASB app, Zelle integration, remote deposit capture, and treasury management services. They position themselves as flexible and responsive partners for real estate investments and business financing, working with customers as "investment partners."

First American State Bank distinguishes itself through several specific commitments: celebrating 30 years of "innovation and growth," promoting their "First Place Banking" program emphasizing personalized financial services, active community involvement (including a 12th annual toy drive), and their stated adoption of "cutting-edge mobile technology" and "groundbreaking treasury management solutions." Testimonials emphasize exceptional staff attention, ease of account management, and going "above and beyond" during sensitive transactions.

As a traditional community bank, First American State Bank is best suited for customers seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making and personalized service rather than the lowest fees or most aggressive digital innovation. The bank appears well-established and stable, though the website provides limited information about specific rates, fees, account minimums, or detailed product comparisons that would allow consumers to benchmark offerings against larger institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal deposit products and savings accounts
Business deposit products and checking accounts
Bridge loans and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs)
Cash management and treasury management solutions
Mobile banking via FASB Mobile App
Remote deposit capture for business accounts
Online check ordering through secure portal
pros: Personalized service model emphasizing relationship banking and knowing clients by name
30 years of operational history and stability in Colorado market
Comprehensive lending options including residential mortgages, commercial real estate, bridge loans, and HELOCs
Mobile banking app (FASB Mobile) for remote access and management
Remote deposit capture and online check ordering available for business customers
Treasury management and cash management solutions tailored to business needs
Active community involvement demonstrated by 12-year toy drive program
cons: Website lacks transparency on specific rates, fees, or account minimums for comparison shopping
Limited information about eligibility requirements, loan terms, or product pricing
Geographically limited to Colorado market (Greenwood Village location)
No information about FDIC insurance coverage or regulatory standing on website
Minimal detail on digital banking features compared to competitors

contact.address: 8390 E Crescent Pkwy, Greenwood Village, CO 80111

best_for: Colorado-based small business owners seeking relationship banking and customized commercial solutions
Real estate investors needing flexible commercial real estate financing and responsive lending partnerships
High-net-worth individuals and professionals valuing personalized service and local decision-making
Customers managing complex financial needs who prefer in-person relationship banking over digital-only institutions
diagnosis: First American State Bank is best for Colorado-based business owners, real estate investors, and professionals seeking personalized relationship banking and customized financial solutions from a stable, community-focused institution. The main caveat is that the bank's website lacks detailed pricing, rate, and fee information necessary for consumers to evaluate competitiveness, and the institution's geographic limitation to Colorado may not serve customers needing multi-state banking presence.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 8390 E Crescent Pkwy, Greenwood Village, CO 80111
